Trusted Tie-Ups

Our Insurance Company Partners

Shikhar IMF is tied up with India's leading insurance companies across General, Health and Life categories

6General Insurers
4Health Insurers
6Life Insurers
Why Multi-Insurer Access Matters

Compare Across 16+ Companies — Get the Best Deal

As an IRDAI-approved Insurance Marketing Firm, Shikhar IMF has official tie-ups with the top insurance companies in India. This means you get genuine comparison, unbiased advice, and access to exclusive plans — all from one trusted advisor.

Official IRDAI-approved tie-ups Unbiased comparison Best rates guaranteed
All Partners

Insurance Companies & Products

Bajaj Allianz General Insurance

General Insurance

One of India's leading general insurers with a strong presence across motor, health, travel and commercial insurance segments.

  • Car & Bike Insurance
  • Travel Insurance (Domestic & International)
  • Home Insurance
  • Commercial Vehicle Insurance
  • Fire & Engineering Insurance
General Get Quote

Go Digit General Insurance

General Insurance

A new-age digital insurer known for simple, transparent products and fast claim settlements through a fully digital platform.

  • Car & Bike Insurance
  • Travel Insurance
  • Home Insurance
  • Shop & Commercial Insurance
  • Mobile Protection
General Get Quote

ICICI Lombard General Insurance

General Insurance

India's largest private general insurer offering comprehensive products with seamless digital experience and wide network support.

  • Motor Insurance (Car, Bike, Commercial)
  • Health Insurance
  • Travel Insurance
  • Property & Marine Insurance
  • Cyber Insurance
General Get Quote

TATA AIG General Insurance

General Insurance

A trusted JV between Tata Group and AIG, offering award-winning general insurance products with global expertise.

  • Car & Two-Wheeler Insurance
  • Travel & Home Insurance
  • Business Guard
  • Liability Insurance
  • Marine Cargo Insurance
General Get Quote

HDFC ERGO General Insurance

General Insurance

A subsidiary of HDFC Group, HDFC ERGO provides diverse general insurance solutions with innovative product offerings.

  • Motor Insurance
  • Health & Critical Illness
  • Property Insurance
  • Marine & Engineering
  • Cyber Sachet Insurance
General Get Quote

United India Insurance

General Insurance (PSU)

A Government of India enterprise and one of India's oldest and most trusted insurance companies with pan-India presence.

  • Fire & Allied Perils
  • Motor Insurance
  • Health Insurance (UIIC)
  • Marine & Cargo
  • Agricultural & Crop Insurance
General · PSU Get Quote

CARE Health Insurance

Health Insurance

Formerly Religare Health Insurance, CARE Health is known for feature-rich health plans with extensive hospital network coverage.

  • Care — Individual & Family Plans
  • Care Senior — Senior Citizens
  • Care Critical — Critical Illness Cover
  • Care Freedom — No Pre-medical Check
  • Group Health Insurance
Health Get Quote

Star Health Insurance

Health Insurance

India's largest standalone health insurer with 14,000+ network hospitals and segment-specific plans for all age groups.

  • Star Family Health Optima
  • Star Comprehensive Insurance
  • Star Senior Citizens Red Carpet
  • Star Women Care
  • Star Diabetes Safe
Health Get Quote

Aditya Birla Health Insurance

Health Insurance

Part of the Aditya Birla Group, offering innovative health plans with wellness rewards and chronic disease management programs.

  • Activ Health Platinum Enhanced
  • Activ Assure Diamond Plus
  • Activ Fit — Young Adults
  • Activ Secure — Critical Illness
  • Group Activ One — Corporate Plans
Health Get Quote

Manipal Cigna Health Insurance

Health Insurance

A joint venture between Manipal Group and Cigna Corporation, offering international-standard health insurance products in India.

  • ProHealth Plus — Comprehensive Cover
  • Prime Advantage — Family Floater
  • Lifestyle Protection — Critical Illness
  • Arogya Sanjeevani — Standard Plan
  • Group Health Solutions
Health Get Quote

ICICI Prudential Life Insurance

Life Insurance

One of India's largest and most trusted private life insurers, offering a wide range of term, savings, and investment plans.

  • iProtect Smart — Term Plan
  • ULIP — Signature & Wealth Builder
  • Guaranteed Income for Tomorrow (GIFT)
  • Pension & Annuity Plans
  • Group Life Insurance
Life Get Quote

HDFC Life Insurance

Life Insurance

A joint venture between HDFC Ltd. and abrdn plc, delivering comprehensive life insurance products with award-winning customer service.

  • Click 2 Protect Life — Term Plan
  • Sanchay Plus — Guaranteed Returns
  • Pro Growth Plus — ULIP
  • New Immediate Annuity Plan
  • Group Credit Life Insurance
Life Get Quote

Bajaj Allianz Life Insurance

Life Insurance

A JV between Bajaj Finserv and Allianz SE, offering customer-centric life insurance products with flexible payout options.

  • eTouch — Online Term Plan
  • Goal Assure II — ULIP
  • Guaranteed Income Goal — Savings
  • Long Life Goal — Retirement
  • Group Term Life Insurance
Life Get Quote

LIC of India

Life Insurance (PSU)

India's largest and most trusted life insurer, a Government of India enterprise with 66 years of legacy and 300+ million policyholders.

  • Jeevan Anand — Whole Life Plan
  • Tech Term — Pure Term Plan
  • New Jeevan Labh — Endowment
  • Jeevan Shanti — Annuity Plan
  • Group Schemes & PMJJBY
Life · PSU Get Quote

SBI Life Insurance

Life Insurance

A joint venture between SBI and BNP Paribas Cardif, leveraging SBI's vast branch network to deliver life insurance across India.

  • eShield Next — Term Plan
  • Smart Wealth Builder — ULIP
  • Flexi Smart Plus — Savings
  • Annuity Plus — Retirement
  • Group Assure — Corporate Plans
Life Get Quote

Max Life Insurance

Life Insurance

A joint venture between Max Financial Services and Axis Bank, known for high claim settlement ratio and customer-first approach.

  • Smart Secure Plus — Term Plan
  • Smart Wealth Plan — ULIP
  • Guaranteed Income Plan — Savings
  • Smart Annuity Plus — Retirement
  • Group Life Insurance Solutions
Life Get Quote
